description: Letter of recommendation. Avraham Maimonides recommends the Nasi ʿOvadya to the community of Bilbays ('to honor him and give him hospitality') after having given special instructions to its dayyan Perahya. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, p. 490, and from Goitein's index cards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-13 לבלבייס. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
